news.summary: NTT DATA, a prominent player in digital business and technology services, unveiled its inaugural sustainability report for NTT Global Data Centers. The report showcases the company's dedication to environmental responsibility and its strides towards reaching Net-Zero emissions within its data centers. By the end of FY23, NTT Global Data Centers managed to attain a noteworthy 51% utilization of renewable energy for non-IT load on a global scale, underlining their commitment to sustainable practices.
news.headline: NTT DATA releases first sustainability report for NTT Global Data Centers division, achieving 51% renewable energy usage in FY23.

news.summary: LandBridge Company LLC (NYSE: LB) disclosed that it will reveal its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 post-market closure on May 7, 2025. Following this, on May 8, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. CT / 9:00 a.m. ET, LandBridge will conduct a webcast and conference call to analyze these results. For those interested in tuning in, they can access the live webcast by visiting the Events and Presentations segment of the LandBridge Investor Relations webpage.
news.headline: LandBridge Company (NYSE: LB) to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 7th, with conference call on May 8th at 8am CT / 9am ET.

news.summary: In Clifton, New Jersey on April 9, 2025, DREO, a leading smart home company, announced their largest summer release yet on April 8. The unveiling took place at a private event at the EDITION in New York City. The highly-anticipated lineup consists of 12 innovative products, covering categories such as cooling, air quality, and kitchen appliances.
news.headline: DREO unveils 12 smart innovations for summer 2025 to redefine home cooling and air quality. Launch at NYC event.

news.summary: Chicago-based company Jones Lang LaSalle Incorporated (NYSE: JLL) has scheduled a conference call and webcast to review its first quarter 2025 financial performance. The event will take place on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, at 9 a.m. Eastern time. Those interested can join the call by dialing (888)... The company aims to provide insights into its quarterly results during this discussion.
news.headline: JLL to host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 7 at 9am ET. Dial (888)... for live access.

news.summary: Globant, a digitally native company, has entered a strategic partnership with Google Cloud to provide specialized solutions for the Media & Entertainment, Retail, Healthcare, and Finance & Banking industries. This collaboration aims to address sector-specific requirements. The announcement was made in New York on April 9, 2025. Globant, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as GLOB, is emphasizing industry-tailored services through this collaboration.
news.headline: Globant partners with Google Cloud to provide industry-specific AI solutions for Media, Retail, Healthcare, Finance.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Maumee, Ohio, Virtual Technologies Group (VTG), a prominent company in IT, security, and cloud services, announced that they offer tailored solutions to clients in various sectors including education, non-profit organizations, manufacturing, healthcare, and the US federal government.
news.headline: Virtual Technologies Group appoints Quentin Gayles as Chief Revenue Officer to drive growth in diverse sectors.

news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on April 9, 2025, 3D Cloud, a prominent company specializing in 3D product visualization and configuration for enterprise retailers and manufacturers, announced the appointment of Geoffrey Mark as the new Executive Director for Home. Mark, previously the Director of CGI Strategy and Operations at Crate and Barrel, is expected to bring his expertise to enhance 3D Cloud's services in the home sector.
news.headline: Former Crate and Barrel CGI leader Geoffrey Mark joins 3D Cloud as Executive Director for Home Furnishings. Fla., April 9, 2025.

news.summary: B. Braun Medical Inc., a prominent smart infusion therapy company based in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, reported on April 9, 2025 that their DUPLEX system has demonstrated lower anticipated direct labor expenses for a pharmacy technician and a nurse compared to both the Baxter Mini-Bag Plus Container System and conventional compounding methods. This could result in significant cost savings for medical facilities. The exact figures were not disclosed but indicate a cost-effective advantage for the DUPLEX system in terms of labor costs.
news.headline: FDA approves B. Braun's Piperacillin & Tazobactam for Injection in DUPLEX system, offering reduced labor costs.

news.summary: In Winter Haven, Florida on April 9, 2025, SouthState Bank unveiled its fifth Corporate Stewardship Report in which it showcases its dedication to communities, employees, corporate stewardship, and environmental initiatives. The report underscores the bank's firm belief in prioritizing customer service and...
news.headline: SouthState Bank releases 2025 Corporate Stewardship Report, emphasizing commitment to communities, employees, environment.

news.summary: A unique journey awaits with 12 botanicals sourced from 9 different countries in the latest endeavor by the makers of Drumshanbo Gunpowder Irish Gin. Making its mark in the US market a decade ago, the brand now embarks on a new chapter with "A Curious Irish Adventure." This 360° campaign marks a first for the spirit maker, promising an exciting experience for consumers.
news.headline: Gunpowder Irish Gin launches new campaign "A Curious Irish Adventure" after 10 years in the US market. 12 botanicals, 9 countries involved.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Sensible Weather, a top provider of Weather Guarantees for travel and outdoor ventures, has collaborated with Polaris Adventures, the experience branch of renowned powersports company Polaris (NYSE: PII). This joint effort aims to offer Weather Guarantees to thrill-seekers across the country. Through this partnership, Sensible Weather's effective Weather Guarantee service will be accessible to customers seeking outdoor adventures via Polaris Adventures' wide array of Outfitters. This collaboration will enhance the experience for individuals looking to engage in outdoor activities, leveraging Polaris Adventures' expansive network.
news.headline: Sensible Weather partners with Polaris Adventures to offer Weather Guarantees nationwide for outdoor activities. #business #partnership #travel

news.summary: In Los Angeles, OneLegacy introduces the LAFF4LIFE program by LEVITY LIVE, LLC in partnership with 12 comedy clubs nationwide. The initiative offers free tickets to registered organ donors at IMPROV and Levity Live venues. LAFF4LIFE, led by a double organ recipient comedian, begins in April in Los Angeles as part of Donate Life Month.
news.headline: OneLegacy introduces LAFF4LIFE comedy series at 12 nationwide Improv Comedy Clubs in April, offering free tickets to registered organ donors.

news.summary: The Vancouver-headquartered functional beverage company Blume has revealed the latest addition to its popular SuperBelly line, Mango Passionfruit. Following the triumph of SuperBelly as a gut-supporting gentle hydration enhancer, the brand is now offering a tropical variant to provide consumers with a taste of paradise in each serving. Over the course of a year, Blume has witnessed remarkable achievements including a notable 110% increase in year-over-year growth.
news.headline: Vancouver-based Blume launches 4th SuperBelly flavor, Mango Passionfruit; reports 110% YoY growth.

news.summary: A mental health care leader, Your Counselling Ltd., has recently opened a new location in Dartmouth, Nova Scotia, and initiated virtual counselling services accessible province-wide. The move aims to provide comprehensive support to individuals, couples, families, and groups in Nova Scotia. This expansion reflects the organization's commitment to offering accessible and compassionate care to everyone.
news.headline: Your Counselling Ltd. opens in Dartmouth, Nova Scotia, offering virtual counselling to all of Nova Scotia.

news.summary: Piper Sandler Companies (NYSE: PIPR), a prominent investment bank, has recently wrapped up its 49th semi-annual Taking Stock With Teens® survey in collaboration with DECA. Over the past 24 years of focusing on teen trends, the Piper Sandler equity research team has accumulated a database of more than 64 million data points. To access the comprehensive list of main insights, review the report summary, and request the complete survey report, please visit the website pipersandler.com/teens. Piper Sandler expresses enthusiasm for the extensive data gathered.
news.headline: Piper Sandler finishes 49th Taking Stock With Teens survey, gathering 64 million data points on teen spending.

news.summary: LP Building Solutions, a prominent manufacturer of top-quality building materials, has introduced the Naturals Collection™, a fresh range of nature-inspired colors in the LP® SmartSide® ExpertFinish® Trim & Siding series. Revealed at the 2025 NAHB International Builders’ Show®, this collection features six adaptable prefinished colors that emulate the appearance of stained wood, obtainable in cedar and brushed smooth finishes.
news.headline: LP Building Solutions launches Naturals Collection™ within LP® SmartSide® ExpertFinish® portfolio at 2025 NAHB International Builders’ Show® with 6 prefinished colors mimicking stained wood.

news.summary: The Food Network New York City Wine & Food Festival has unveiled plans for its 2025 event, which will take place from October 15th to 19th. The festival, presented by Invesco QQQ, will feature a revamped menu and will be held in Lower Manhattan's Seaport area. Partnered with Food Network, the event aims to celebrate global flavors, talents, and ideas in a more intimate setting. This move signals a return to the festival's local roots, and is set to anchor in one of NYC's historic neighborhoods.
news.headline: Food Network NYCWFF relaunching in 2025 in Seaport, Lower Manhattan. Oct 15-19. New menu and partnerships. Celebrating global flavors.

news.summary: Today, a major announcement was made in New York as Harry’s Inc. revealed its rebranding as “Mammoth Brands.” This move signifies the company's transformation into the largest consumer packaged goods (CPG) company established in the past two decades, with ambitions to expand its range of brands further. The leadership of Mammoth Brands is in the capable hands of co-founders and co-CEOs Jeff Raider and Andy Katz-Mayfield, known for launching the company's first brand, Harry’s, in 2013. Since its inception, Mammoth Brands has introduced a new operational model to the CPG sector and has achieved significant growth.
news.headline: Harry’s Inc. changes to "Mammoth Brands" to showcase its growth and aims to expand portfolio. Co-CEOs are Jeff Raider and Andy Katz-Mayfield.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Southern Glazer's revealed a national distribution agreement for the Canadian market with Campari Canada. This partnership will expand the reach of Campari's products across Canada through Southern Glazer's extensive distribution network. This strategic alliance aims to enhance market presence and accessibility for Campari's offerings, leveraging Southern Glazer's established distribution channels. The agreement signifies a significant milestone for both companies, paving the way for increased market penetration and consumer engagement.
news.headline: Southern Glazer’s Wine & Spirits of Canada partners with Campari Canada in national distribution agreement.

news.summary: Sweetgreen, Inc. (NYSE: SG) is set to disclose its financial performance for Q1 of 2025 after the market closes on Thursday, May 8, 2025. A webcast is scheduled for that day at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) to analyze the company’s financial standing. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the earnings call via the investor relations segment of Sweetgreen's website at https://investor.sweetgreen.com/. Additional details can be found on the site after the event.
news.headline: Sweetgreen (NYSE: SG) will announce Q1 2025 results on May 8, 2025, with a webcast discussing business and financials.

news.summary: The Smart Factory Market in the US is expected to grow from USD 18.8 billion in 2024 to USD 30.1 billion by 2029, with a projected CAGR of 9.8% during the same period. The growth is driven by the country's large industrial base and high production capacities. US manufacturers are increasingly adopting automation technologies to improve operational efficiency and product quality while optimizing resources. The government's focus on research and innovation has led to advancements in science and technology, with significant investments in smart factory solutions across sectors. Key players in the industry include Emerson Electric Co., General Electric, Rockwell Automation, Inc., and Honeywell International Inc. The industrial sensors market holds a significant share in the US smart factory market, driven by automation and Industry 4.0 adoption. Sensors are essential for monitoring operations, enhancing efficiency, reducing downtime, and optimizing workflows across various industries. The evolving IoT and advanced data analytics are transforming sensors to enable real-time decision-making and predictive maintenance, aiding businesses in streamlining their operations.
news.headline: US Smart Factory Market to hit $30.1B by 2029, growing at CAGR of 9.8% from $18.8B in 2024. Industrial sensors are key drivers for automation.
Future German Coalition: It will abolish turbo naturalization of migrants after three years, but to maintain citizenship reforms.
German Coalition Government to create expert commission on debt brake modernisation, wants to finish legislation by end 2025 - Document.
Future German Coalition: It will end all federal admissions programs for refugees, not establish new programs.

news.summary: In Woodland Hills, California, 2024 has been marked as the deadliest year for police violence in the U.S. so far, with 326 Black individuals having been killed by police. This represents a significant 12% surge from the previous year. Notably, Black women, who constitute roughly 10% of the female population in the country, represent 20% of all women killed by police. Shockingly, nearly one-third of unarmed women killed by police are Black. The prevalence of police body cameras has not served as a deterrent, as incidents of police violence persist.
news.headline: Courageous Conversation® Global Foundation unveils wearable camera; 326 Black people killed by police in 2024, up by 12%.

news.summary: FREDsense Technologies, a leading provider of PFAS sample analysis, has appointed Eric Stoermer as the new President. The company recently introduced FRED-PFAS™, the industry's first portable test kit for PFAS contamination. This new innovation is revolutionizing the slow turnaround times, high costs, and complexity associated with traditional PFAS sample analysis. Stoermer's appointment comes at a crucial time for the company as they continue to make strides in providing efficient solutions in this field.
news.headline: FREDsense appoints Eric Stoermer as new President to lead growth & scale, following launch of FRED-PFAS™ kit.

news.summary: The Polymesh Association in Zug, Switzerland, has joined forces with BitGo, a top digital asset solutions provider, establishing Polymesh as BitGo’s premier layer 1 blockchain for real world asset (RWA) tokenization. BitGo's recent acquisition of Brassica aimed to enhance their RWA capabilities, demonstrating their dedication to the RWA sector. This collaboration signifies BitGo's ongoing support for RWA, combining their expertise with Polymesh’s blockchain technology.
news.headline: BitGo partners with Polymesh in RWA tokenization, making Polymesh BitGo's inaugural layer 1 blockchain.

news.summary: IVI RMA North America, a prominent fertility care provider, has partnered with TMRW Life Sciences, a leading fertility technology company. This collaboration involves TMRW storing the eggs and embryos of over tens of thousands of IVI RMA North America patients at both their 22+ IVF labs and offsite facilities. TMRW offers advanced FDA-cleared solutions for the secure storage of frozen reproductive materials, ensuring the safe preservation of these assets.
news.headline: IVI RMA North America partners with TMRW Life Sciences to digitize IVF specimen management and storage. Over 22 IVF labs involved.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) has revealed that the Elasticsearch vector database is officially recognized as a supported information retrieval engine for Google Cloud’s Vertex AI platform. According to Shay Banon, the founder and chief technology officer at Elastic, this integration allows mutual customers to effortlessly create RAG applications within a unified workflow. This solution facilitates quicker deployment processes by leveraging the capabilities of both technologies.
news.headline: Elasticsearch now integrated in Google Cloud’s Vertex AI platform for seamless RAG application building.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Bluestone Lane, the renowned Australian coffee roaster and café brand, revealed a major technology collaboration with Square. Square, known for its user-friendly technology that aids restaurants in achieving success by combining hospitality, scalability, and operational efficiency, has teamed up with Bluestone Lane. The brand has upgraded from their old point-of-sale system to Square's comprehensive technology platform in all 65 of its locations. This move aims to enhance customer experience and streamline operations for Bluestone Lane.
news.headline: Bluestone Lane partners with Square across 65 locations to enhance tech and replace legacy POS system.

news.summary: Powin, a global energy storage integrator from the U.S., has teamed up with Circulor, a supply chain traceability solution, to provide battery passports for energy storage systems in grid applications. This partnership establishes a higher level of responsible sourcing in the battery energy storage system market by ensuring end-to-end material traceability. Commencing this month, the collaboration signifies a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: Powin and Circulor partner to advance battery passports for energy storage systems, ensuring responsible sourcing.

news.summary: In Seattle, the rapid adoption of AI is evident in critical sectors like healthcare, life science, finance, and security. However, a significant challenge persists: the need to trust and maximize AI's capabilities when decision-making processes are not transparent. This lack of clarity in Large Language Models (LLMs) hinders the creation of reliable AI solutions that can undergo validation, audits, and regulation. Moreover, the opaque nature of LLMs restricts advancements in scientifically sound AI development. To address this issue, efforts are underway to enhance transparency and ensure the effective utilization of AI.
news.headline: AI2 launches OLMoTrace to provide transparency in LLMs, enabling trust and understanding in AI.

news.summary: In Chicago, GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) recently named Jeannette Bankes as the new president and CEO of Patient Care Solutions, starting from May 1, 2025. The appointment was announced by Peter Arduini, president and CEO of GE HealthCare, who praised Bankes as an accomplished leader with a wealth of experience in publicly traded healthcare companies. This move signals a strategic decision by GE HealthCare to entrust the direction of Patient Care Solutions to an industry veteran like Bankes. This transition emphasizes the company's commitment to strengthening their healthcare solutions division under Bankes' capable leadership.
news.headline: Jeannette Bankes named president and CEO of Patient Care Solutions at GE HealthCare, starting May 1, 2025.

news.summary: Innovid's recent feature updates are enabling brands to amplify their impact on Connected TV (CTV) and enhance performance. These enhancements provide brands with the tools to expand their creative reach and drive engagement.
news.headline: Innovid introduces new tools to enhance CTV ads, making them more engaging and shoppable, aiming to improve performance.

news.summary: A recent report by Forescout on the Riskiest Connected Devices of 2025, based in San Jose, California, indicates a notable rise in average device risk with a 15% year-on-year growth.
news.headline: Forescout report finds a 15% rise in average device risk by 2025, highlighting vulnerabilities in IoMT.

news.summary: B2B Stars, a B2B database specializing in AI-native deep analytics, has officially launched for businesses in the United States.
news.headline: B2B Stars, an AI-powered B2B database, launches in the U.S., offering deep analytics for American companies.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Aravo, a top company offering third-party risk management solutions with intelligent automation, declared today that it secured the 2025 TPRM Service Provider Innovator Award from the Third Party Risk Association (TPRA). This prestigious award highlights Aravo's commitment to ongoing innovation, providing reliable solutions that empower risk management experts. TPRA acknowledged winners in various award categories alongside Aravo.
news.headline: Aravo wins 2025 TPRM Innovator Award by Third Party Risk Association for dedication to innovation.

news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California, Menlo Security, known for its browser security technology, revealed today the incorporation of Menlo Secure Application Access into Cloud WAN by Google Cloud. This collaboration introduces a Zero Trust Access solution for enterprises' SaaS and private applications within the new wide area network product. By integrating this feature, the necessity for extra network elements diminishes, streamlining the setup process for managed, BYOD, and unmanaged users and devices. This development caters to the evolving requirements brought about by hybrid work setups.
news.headline: Menlo Security integrates with Google Cloud WAN to offer Zero Trust Access, simplifying setup for enterprises.

news.summary: In New York, a pioneering company called Coalition has introduced the Coalition Active Cyber Policy, a groundbreaking insurance product that aims to proactively address digital risks before they occur. This innovative policy is the first of its kind in the world and is specifically tailored for the United States surplus lines market. It offers data-driven coverage enhancements and comprehensive protection, safeguarding businesses against the constantly changing digital risk environment. By launching the Active Cyber Policy, Coalition is establishing a new benchmark in the insurance industry with cutting-edge coverage solutions.
news.headline: Coalition launches Active Cyber Policy to prevent digital risk: innovations in US surplus lines cyber policy to protect businesses.

news.summary: Brightwave introduced a new deep research platform specifically designed for private market investors in New York. The platform includes new features like Report Builder and Blueprints, enabling investment teams to create and share analytical reports using various documents from deal rooms, financial models, proprietary notes, and other sources. Brightwave's platform differs from traditional search tools and chat interfaces, offering a more autonomous and user-friendly experience. This innovation provides private market investors with a seamless way to access and analyze data, enhancing their decision-making process.
news.headline: Brightwave launches a new research platform with Report Builder and Blueprints for private market investors.

news.summary: In Danvers, Massachusetts, it was announced today by the Japan Academic Association for Copyright Clearance (JAC) and RightsDirect Japan, a subsidiary of CCC, that there is now access to artificial intelligence (AI) re-use rights available in the Digital Copyright License (DCL). This enterprise-wide content licensing solution offers rights to millions of works for businesses. The JAC DCL allows companies based in Japan to share and store content.
news.headline: JAC and RightsDirect Japan offer AI Re-Use Rights in DCL for businesses in Japan, for access to millions of works.

news.summary: Object First, based in Beverly, Mass., has unveiled research findings indicating that 81% of IT experts believe that having immutable backup storage founded on Zero Trust principles offers the most effective protection against ransomware attacks. Moreover, 54% of respondents consider target backup appliances to be more secure compared to integrated appliances. The investigation was carried out by Informa TechTarget’s Enterprise Strategy Group and was supported by Object First.
news.headline: Immutable backup storage using Zero Trust principles is key against ransomware. 81% IT pros agree. 54% prefer target backup appliances.

news.summary: Forescout EyeScope® offers network, security, and incident response teams in San Jose, Calif with an integrated platform for overseeing their device landscape. This tool aims to provide a consolidated and current perspective on the network, enabling teams to respond efficiently to potential security incidents.
news.headline: Forescout launches eyeScope® for cloud, offering asset intelligence and control for network and security teams.

news.summary: Recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings is the "Negotiating and Drafting IT Contracts Training Course." This training course aims to provide insight into the complexities of IT contracts to enable participants to draft robust agreements and effectively mitigate risks. In today's competitive commercial landscape, it is crucial for all parties involved in IT transactions to comprehend industry trends and standards. By doing so, individuals can secure the most favorable terms and ensure optimal outcomes.
news.headline: Training course on negotiating and drafting IT contracts added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering. Understand complexities to ensure watertight agreements.
EU adopts tariffs on €21 billion of US goods in metals dispute.
